claims.text: I am energized to bring 19+ years of shipping production web systems at enterprise scale directly to the problems your team is solving.
claims.reframing_note: Offer-register phrasing ('energized', 'directly to the problems your team is solving') layered on the candidate summary; every fact traces to the span.

claims.text: In my current role I led AI-assisted engineering adoption across a 20-person delivery team through 2025-2026, standardizing modern tooling so the whole squad shipped faster.
claims.reframing_note: Tone lifted to the offer's fast-moving delivery register; the 20-person team and 2025-2026 span are in-source.

claims.text: I introduced CI/CD tooling and Capistrano automation to achieve zero-downtime releases - exactly the kind of reliable, always-on delivery an analytics platform depends on.
claims.reframing_note: Framed toward the offer's platform-reliability register; the zero-downtime CI/CD claim traces to the span.

claims.text: I raise engineering quality where it counts: I lifted core-module test coverage to 80%+ by enforcing PHPUnit and PHP Code Sniffer across delivery squads.
claims.reframing_note: Confident offer-register phrasing; the 80%+ coverage figure is present in the cited span.

claims.text: As a Lead Software Engineer I would welcome the chance to bring that same enterprise-scale focus to your team.
